raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find modified in last 60 days and tar to file. Use find -mtime -60. tar -czf. Use -C? We'll tar from directory. Command: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60). But need include subdirectories? Probably all files in that directory. Use find /system/folder1 -type f -mtime -60 -print0 | tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz --null -T - . But tar expects paths relative? Use -C. Simpler: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60). Provide command.

Simpler: tar -czf /mytarfile.tgz -C /system/folder1 $(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -mtime -60). Provide command.
